title: nenax hirta subsp. caliciphila
intro: Nenax hirta subsp. caliciphila, also known as the Mountain Mint, is a subspecies of the Nenax hirta plant, a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Nenax hirta subsp. caliciphila include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
